INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('b5eb1bf7-47c6-4ea1-bbed-957464f7d231', 'When $x = 4$, what is the value of $y$?', '$y = 3x + 1$', NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"$13$","is_correct":true,"explanation":"$y = 3(4) + 1 = 13$."},{"id":"B","text":"$14$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"This adds 1 to the correct value."},{"id":"C","text":"$12$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"This subtracts 1 from the correct value."},{"id":"D","text":"$4$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"This adds slope and intercept instead of evaluating."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'Substitute $x = 4$: $y = 3(4) + 1 = 13$.', NULL, 'Algebra', 'Linear equations in two variables', 'math', 'algebra', 'LEQ', 'LEQ', 'hard', true, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
